turns.name: Discover scope and anchors
turns.user: Discover AD scope and identify primary anchor DC for this run.

turns.name: Baseline anchor DC
turns.user: Start on AD0 if available, otherwise first discovered DC. Collect reboot and directory-service evidence with UTC timestamps.

turns.name: Continue all remaining DCs
turns.user: Continue now with all remaining discovered DCs in this same turn and keep results grouped per host.

turns.name: Retry one failed host once
turns.user: If any host failed, retry exactly once with narrower scope and continue with the rest.

turns.name: Cross-DC status table
turns.user: Return cross-DC table with evidence present/missing, earliest UTC, latest UTC, and confidence.

turns.name: Replication tie-in
turns.user: Correlate findings with replication health signals for same DC set.

turns.name: Unreachable hosts handling
turns.user: If a host is unreachable, state exact blocker and continue analysis instead of stopping.

turns.name: Top likely causes
turns.user: List top likely cause categories with confidence and strongest evidence per category.

turns.name: Execute-now checklist
turns.user: Provide short execute-now checklist for next 30 minutes. No questions.

turns.name: Final compact summary
turns.user: Provide final 6-bullet summary with UTC markers, DC coverage count, unresolved blockers, and rerun trigger.
